title: Deterministic Telegram-origin routing for post-restart completion context
summary: Ensure restart completions triggered from Telegram always route back to Telegram with restored identity metadata, avoiding fallback to startup/web sessions.

affectedFiles.description: Add Telegram identity fields to RestartContext and persist them in saved restart context.
Resolve post-restart channel/session deterministically and restore Telegram identity/origin before completion routing.

diffPreview:
- RestartContext lacked Telegram identity fields.
+ Added previousTelegramChatId and previousTelegramUserId to RestartContext.
- Persisted previousSessionId/channel/origin only.
+ Persist now includes previousTelegramChatId/previousTelegramUserId.
- Boot routing hardcoded boot-startup fallback for Telegram path.
+ Boot routing now uses resolvedChannel/resolvedOrigin/resolvedSessionId with telegram-bootstrap fallback for Telegram.
+ If Telegram channel/origin is detected, restore telegramChatId/telegramUserId and force SESSION_ORIGIN_TELEGRAM before logging and context handoff.
estimatedImpact: Eliminates wrong-channel post-restart confirmations for Telegram-triggered restarts and makes restart completion routing deterministic across channels.
executorPrompt: Apply the approved source edits exactly as specified in the proposal for src/gateway/lifecycle.ts and src/gateway/boot.ts. Preserve formatting and existing logic outside the described blocks. Then run npm run build and report results. If build passes, summarize changed lines and confirm deterministic Telegram routing behavior criteria are satisfied.
